name: Zed Shaw
tagline: Programming education, art, and industry critique
description: Exploring Zed Shaw's writings on programming education, tech industry criticism, art, and the culture of software development.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing a blog post by Zed Shaw, creator of 'Learn Code the Hard Way' and the Mongrel web server. He is known for provocative takes on programming education, tech industry culture, coding bootcamps, and the treatment of open source developers. He is also a painter and writer on art education.

spiciness.contextPrompt: Zed Shaw is known for his confrontational writing style, fierce critiques of tech companies exploiting open source, strong opinions on programming education, and challenging conventional wisdom in the software industry. His famous 'Rails Is A Ghetto' post exemplifies his willingness to burn bridges.
